prompt: A candid, warm-toned photograph of two men sitting at a table in a dimly lit upscale restaurant at night. On the left is a man with dark hair wearing a dark grey crewneck sweater. On the right is a man with glasses and receding curly dark hair wearing a dark blue sweater over a collared shirt. They are celebrating enthusiastically, mouths wide open cheering, clasping one hand together while raising their other fists in triumph. The table is covered with a white tablecloth and features two menus with the text "THE GREENE", water glasses, a glass of red wine, and a small lit candle in a ribbed glass holder. The background shows blurred restaurant interiors and dark windows with distant city lights, creating an intimate and joyful atmosphere.
